title: LEFT JOIN: include movies with zero showtimes
prompt_md: Count how many showtimes each movie has — **including movies that have none**. Return the movie `title` and the count aliased as `showtimes`. Use a `LEFT JOIN` from `movies` to `showtimes` so zero-showtime movies still appear.
starter_code:
SELECT m.title, COUNT(s.id)::int AS showtimes
FROM movies m
LEFT JOIN showtimes s ON s.movie_id = m.id
GROUP BY m.title;
hints: A `LEFT JOIN` keeps every row from the left table (`movies`) even with no match.
Count `s.id` (not `*`) so unmatched movies count as 0, then `GROUP BY m.title`.
reference_solution: SELECT m.title, COUNT(s.id)::int AS showtimes FROM movies m LEFT JOIN showtimes s ON s.movie_id = m.id GROUP BY m.title;
